title: Accountability System Metadata (self-contained per-annual sidecar) v2
description: One file describes exactly one (jurisdiction x accountability_system x year). The accountability system is a state-wide object that USES one or more assessment systems: it carries the policy goals a score is measured against, year-resolved, each cross-linking an assessment system + content area (ADR-002). v2 (ADR-009 D5) adds the policy blocks reclassified out of the colleague spec's measurement extensions: growth_targets, timelines, and participation, plus source_documents[]. targets[] is unchanged from v1 — the SGPc re-merge contract is untouched. growth_targets shape is provisional and hardens when the first real record is authored.

schema_version.description: Canonical v2 identifier. Supersedes amr.accountability_system.v1, which remains accepted by the validator during the migration window.

source_documents.description: Evidence list beyond the primary provenance.source_citation (state board rules, ESSA plans, exit-criteria memos). url may be null when known but not yet located (ADR-009 D4).

targets.description: Criterion-referenced achievement targets: the policy goal a score is measured against. Each target cross-links the assessment system + content area it applies to. Unchanged from v1 (SGPc re-merge contract).

assessment_system_id.description: Cross-link to an assessment record (same jurisdiction + year).

semantics.description: exit (ELP reclassification) or proficiency (summative accountability goal).

basis.description: proficiency_boundary resolves against the linked assessment's cutscores + proficient mask; scale_score carries explicit per-grade thresholds; level is reserved.

per_grade_scale_score.description: Required for basis='scale_score': ENROLLED grade -> scale-score threshold (axis rule: grade keys are enrolled grades).

level_value.description: For basis='level' (deferred): the fractional level target (e.g. 4.2).

growth_targets.description: Expected growth toward exit/proficiency (reclassified from colleague elp$growth_targets — ADR-009 D5). PROVISIONAL SHAPE: required cross-link + description; per-grade values optional. Harden when the first real record is authored.

description.description: The growth expectation rule in prose (e.g. 'gain >= 0.5 proficiency levels per year toward exit').

per_grade.description: Optional ENROLLED grade -> numeric growth expectation.

timelines.description: Exit/on-time policy timelines (reclassified from colleague elp$timelines — ADR-009 D5).

ltel_definition.description: Long-term English learner definition (e.g. '> 6 years without exit').

participation.description: Participation policy (reclassified from colleague alternate$participation_criteria / federal_cap — ADR-009 D5).

criteria.description: Participation criteria statements (e.g. alternate-assessment eligibility rules).

federal_cap.description: Federal alternate-assessment participation cap as a proportion (e.g. 0.01).

notes.description: Optional free-text interpretive note for this accountability administration. Distinct from provenance.source_citation; a note may also attach per target.
